response.overview: The story tells of two siblings who are at odds with each other, Aidil and Adib. However, when their mother, Hajah Quyah, becomes entangled in a 'scam' while trying to maintain her position as President of the Marhaban Association, Aidil and Adib attempt to find the mastermind who has deceived their mother. Throughout their pursuit of the 'scammer', many incidents occur, including romantic entanglements between both Aidil and Adib towards a girl.
response.title: Scammer Geng Marhaban
